transcript.text:
There it is..!
(Where is this place packed with lines of people...?!)
('Yogurt World'...?) "'Yogurt World' welcomes Tzuyang"
(It's a place that will)
(freshen up your bitter days...)
(This is the 'Yogurt World'!) Welcome to 'Yogurt World'!
(The parade of yogurt that'll bring joy,)
(is about to begin!!!)
(It's full of various yogurt attractions)
(5 stars!) This is really great
(And for the grand finale...)
(Tzuyang will be the main star of this parade...!)
(Enter the world of happiness and joyous shouts)
(It's the 'Yogurt World'!)
Hello everyone
I'm here at

(Hayang-eup, Gyeongsan-si) Hayang-eup in Daegu
And I'm here today because...
I was...
Invited to the 'Yogurt World'!
(They even do deliveries...?) Their rating on the delivery app was so good!
(Baemin*) They have 2,500 reviews and most of them were 5 out of 5 *Food delivery app
So I'm hyped to be here
Huh?!?
What is that LOL
Are you seeing this?
(Welcome to the 'Yogurt World'...!) "'Yogurt World' welcomes Tzuyang"
That's just huge
Huh?!?
- (Don't keep us waiting!!) - Hello, everyone
Welcome to our store!!!
(Welcome to 'Yogurt World'!!)

(Enters the store)
(Full of expectations...) Nice to meet you
(Yaaaaaaaay!)
(Hooooray!) There's Tzuyang!
(Talk about the hospitality of socialites...LOL) Welcome to 'Yogurt World'
(And the introvert remains silent..)
- I'm at a loss for words - You're so thin!
(Trying to get a convo) You're so thin!
(Now to the main story...) Our 'Yogurt World'...
(Steals the line) 'Yogurt World' serves!
Fresh fruits!
Along with quality yogurt ice cream
that brings joy to our customers, thank you
(Rapturous applause...LOL)
(Ordering) There are so many menus
(Plain, Green tea, Tropical, Strawberry) We have 4 kinds of ice cream

(The set menu consists of recommended combo!) We've put many set menus with recommendations
You can just choose whatever you want
I'll have Yogurt ice cream and Tropical ice cream
Strawberry ice cream, Green Tea Yogurt ice cream Nana berry, Strawberry Bomb ice cream
So many strawberries!
Lotus world, Blueberry Greek Yogurt, Cats Greek Yogurt
And we got good coffee
They're really good!!
(Americano) I don't drink Americanos but since we got so much sweet stuff let's...(give it a try!)
Mango is good too
(Mango yogurt latte, strawberry yogurt latte) Mango is good?
Yeah LOLOL
(Speechless...) With Shine Muscat Ade
Omelette, Churros, Croiffles*, Fish-shaped buns *Croissant + Waffles
(And the Salt Bread as well!) That'll be my order
- We'll make it good for you! - Thank you!

(With special yogurt ice cream made by 'Yogurt World')
(Lotus World)
(And endless bombings of strawberries...)
(Strawberry Bomb Ice cream)
(Nana Berry)
(All the menus with sides are ready!)
(And colorful drinks as well!)
(They're being served)
- We'll set it up for you - Okay
Thank you
Thank you
(Everything's served) Whoa, they all look so pretty
(It's a special episode...!) I rarely do dessert mukbang
(And the table's full of them...) And I never tried this much ice cream before
This one's Tropical, this is the Plain flavor
And Green Tea, and Strawberry

This is Strawberry Bomb ice cream
Lotus World
Nana Berry
Blueberry Yogurt and other desserts
I'll try this one first
I was so curious about this one
It's called Nana Berry
(Nana Berry) It's got a honeycomb in it
I really wanted to try that one
Bon Appetit!
It's strawberry ice cream
It's got the ice cream
And it's presented
so nicely!
I think I know why they got good ratings
(Impressed) It's so good

(Stuttering her words...) I mean...how should I..how can I...
Because it's yogurt ice cream,
it's got a fresh taste!
(Cats Greek Yogurt) This one's greek yogurt?
(Along with various toppings...!)
(The presentation can't get more colorful than this) It's presented so nicely!
They all look so pretty!
Should I try the plain one first?
Oh, it's...
You know how you can feel the ice texture in yogurt ice cream
But this one has really soft texture
I think it has all the good sides of all the ice creams out there!
(Rice puffs that go well with the Plain ice cream) And they serve it with rice puffs
I never thought yogurt ice cream can be this good
This one is...
You know how you get

thirsty at the end when you have
too much ice cream?
This one's really fresh,
and so clean!
Oh, and I wanted to try this one
The rice puff...
(Ice cream sandwich :))
(Greek yogurt flakes) Let's sprinkle some...
The next one is!
I'm not sure what to eat first because there are so many
(Tropical Yogurt Ice Cream) I wonder how will it taste like?
I can't even imagine
It's delicious...!
It really is tropical
I feel like
I'm

in Hawaii...!
This will make a perfect combo with fruits
(Adding mangos & melons!)
It's all fresh fruits!
I never thought yogurt ice cream...
can really go well with fruits
(And she's here to explain more about the menu) You won't find Tropical, Strawberry, and Green tea flavors
in other stores!
They don't have these flavors?
They don't
(She's on a mission) It's only available in 'Yogurt World'
- Thank you - (Love you!)
And come to think of it, I think it's really true
I think I've only had plain yogurt ice creams
Now to Green Tea flavor!
(Green Tea Yogurt Ice Cream) I've never tried green tea-flavored yogurt ice cream!

It's not bitter, rather it's really fresh!
It's fresh in the beginning
And the green tea flavor kicks in
And it ends with a
clean taste
Which topping should I go with?
(Recommendations) It goes well with chocolates
and cookie crumbs
- (Coming right up) - Thank you
(There you go) Wow, thank you!
Yay! Chocolates!
(Sprinkles!)
(And the crumbs!)
This is it!!!!
It's a must to have
chocolates with green tea

(Green tea ♡ Chocolate)
Now the strawberry yogurt!
(Strawberry Yogurt Ice Cream) And it's a brand new menu...?
- I bet it'll be great...! - LOLOL
(We made it with love)
And this is the extra topping, sending my love!
But the tip is required... LOL
This is so good
And...
I think it'll be great
with this croiffle
(They know how to make a good combo...!) I think it's going to be great
I just realized they got good desserts as well
They all go well with the ice cream
I'm so happy now
(Saving it for the finale) I should save it for later

It's strawberry marmalade!
They said they go well together
If you see it
closely here
It's got chunks of strawberry here
(It's all homemade marmalade)
I've tried all of the basic flavors
And they were really great
Because it's yogurt, I bet it's healthier
with fewer calories
I bet
you won't get tired of this fresh taste
(The honeycomb...!) I've seen many videos of this, but I've never tried it myself
Whoa...!
(It's a topping...) It's super sweet
I should try it with the ice cream

This is so good, I wish I had it every day
I really want this
Maybe it's around the house?
(Grant my wish, god of yogurt..) Please, I need this place...
Oh! There's one!
And this place has 5 stars as well!
The best menu here says
it's Crispy Churros
(Can't miss the best menu!) Maybe I should try one now
Churros!
I'll get a bite of it!
(It's a must to eat it with ice cream) This is what I'm talking about
Actually, the strawberry marmalade...
is included in the Strawberry Bomb Set
(But it went inside the yogurt ice cream...LOL)
Oh, so it's for this one?

We can get you another one!!!
Since this strawberry is the highlight
I'll try the Lotus flavor before that
(Lotus World) And I guess it's Lotus powder?
I'm loving the crispy texture...!
I think it'll go well with the buns!
On top of fish-shaped buns...
What...
(It's strangely good...LOL) It's so good!
Crispy on the outside, chewy on the inside
I'll get more desserts...
Yeeek?!?! What is this!?
It's so fluffy!
(Super soft...!)
This feels better than my cat!
(An omelet? Beats me...?)

It's softer than castella...!
(The staff looks quite busy now...)
Because of the banner outside...
We have loads of fans coming in...
(The banner brought...)
(SO MANY PEOPLE!)
(Everyone's in line to see Tzuyang...)
(Baffled) Wait...who? Someone's here?
(Preparing herself...LOL) Oh, what do I do...
- We actually had it out for a year!! - For a year?!
(So gullible)
(The one who made the joke seems more baffled)
Since everyone outside
is all fan of yours...
(It's on 'Yogurt World'...!) All of their orders will be on the house
No, it should be my treat!

(Without hesitating) Okay then, thanks!
It'll be my treat today
(We'll serve you after 4!)
You really should get this omelet!
(Shine muscat)
The drinks are good too...!
Salt bread!
I should eat this with green tea yogurt ice cream
(Nom)
They also make a great combo
Oh, and I'm curious about this one
I never had greek yogurt before
(Blueberry Greek Yogurt)
It's not like cheese
How should I say this?
So that's what it tastes like

It's so good!
I heard greek yogurts are great for diet plans
but this is way too delicious to make it to the plan!
It's like super thick...
Cream?
Let's get a big bite!
This one's called Cats!
(Cats Greek Yogurt) It's got some berries in it, I wonder what they are!
It's beyond this world...!
I think I can go on a diet forever
If the meal plan has these tasty ones...!
(Peek) Nevermind
It's so delicious!
Now to the grand finale...
(Strawberry Bomb...!)
(Strawberry Bomb Ice Cream) They told me to spread the marmalade

Huh...?
(And it's time to greet the fans!)
(The little fellas waited so long for this moment) Welcome! Thanks for coming!
They're the ones who waited
the most!
Since 2:30...
(They waited an hour and a half...!) Really?
(With all her heart) It's on Ms.Tzuyang today, enjoy your yogurt...!
(It's Tzuyang...!)
(A sweet gift to the fans)
(And she got a sweet present as well) Oh, it's Pepero Day* *Similar to Valentine's Day
Thank you so much
(From a Japanese fan)
(to an extraordianry(?) one)
(We served them all with ice cream!)
(Still amazed by the fans)

I'm at a loss for words now LOL
I'm really thankful for all
the fans who came here
(Fortunately, the ice creams are still there) And meeting them took quite a time
But it didn't melt that much
(Now to the long-awaited bomb...!) They all entered the moment I put the marmalade...
(Strawberry Bomb!) The last one! It's literally bombed with strawberries
(Say sorry to your teeth today, not your palate...LOL)
This is so good...!
It's not the sour ones
It's really...
Super sweet ones
This is fresh!
I'm loving the fruits here
Because...
When you get frozen desserts, it's almost always frozen fruits

But it's all fresh ones here
I think the croiffles
will go great with the greek yogurt
They really go well together!
My favorite pick of the day...
(Tzuyang's favorite) is Nana Berry!
(Tzuyang's 2nd best choice) The second one is Tropical Yogurt Ice Cream! It's really my thing
(While she's trying to get the rest of them...)
I think there are...
More fans outside!
And we're worried that you might get a stomachache from cold desserts...
(You should stop!)
It sure got chilly now...LOL
I was wondering...
If I could make the
- ice cream myself for the customers? - Yeah!

(Agreed) We'll show you how it's done!
- Really? - Yeah
(Time to get some latte before they come in!)
(Strawberry Yogurt Latte)
Looks delicious!
And the color is so pretty
It's in gradation!
I'll try it
It's so good...!
Because it has
yogurt in it, it's way
thicker than the usual ones
(The difference) The yogurt really adds the freshness
Mango Yogurt Latte!
The color looks better once you mix it
It's...

This is way more delicious!
Awesome!
(The mango flavor is all over the place) And it's quite aromatic!
It's my first time trying greek yogurt and they're so good
Or maybe it's because of the blueberry...?
(I'll figure it out!) I'll try the plain yogurt then
I think this white one is plain flavored
It's so good, how do you make these?
But this strawberry is the bomb
Since strawberry is in season
No wonder they taste great
Delicious!
(I'm all in for this combo) The strawberry and yogurt ice cream goes so well
(Meanwhile, out on the stairs...)
(More fans are waiting in line...!)
(Fans are still there)

(Oh, yeah, I was in a trance...) Oh, yeah! That's right
(The fans are entering the store now) So many of them are here
to see me in person
(It's about time I served them right!) So I'll fix them some yogurt myself
(Enters the kitchen)
How was it?
- Everything was really great! - Wow! Really?
(Different flavors of ice cream and various toppings were so good!)
(Cute)
(Off to see the fans!) That looks really cute
(Enters the room)
(And the whole store is crowded...)
(Thank you all for coming...!)
(I should at least show them my face...!)
(It's Tzuyang!!!)
(I'm so overwhelmed...LOL)

(Time to treat them right!)
Oh! This is fun! LOLOL
(And the ice cream is ready to be served!)
(Here I come, my dearest fans!)
(They look so excited LOLOLOL) You're so pretty!
(Bowling pins?)
(They're so hyped up to see her LOLOL)
(Holds)
(Electrified)
(Their response is out of this world...)
(And there were...)
(more electrifying experiences...)
(Serving the ice cream with all her heart)
(Thumbs up)
('Yogurt World' is a place where)
(everyone can enjoy the freshness)

(Eating with their masks on LOL)
- It's super good!! - Delicious!!
(It's so sweet that she almost swore...!) It's freaking good!!!
(Ay!)
(Impressed) It's crazy
(She said that she makes regular deliveries!)
- All I can say is, it's just out of this world - (I'm already zoned out...)
We're glad that Tzuyang visited our 'Yogurt World' Hehe
Thank you all for coming
And we hope...
you visit our 'Yogurt World'
I've never done ice cream mukbang before
But I had a really great time
I was also
glad to see many customers and fans here today
(Thanks to all the fans and 'Yogurt World' for joining us today!)
